title: Architect Worker Thread Pools
description: Architect Worker Thread Pools to offload CPU-bound tasks from the primary Event Loop. Manage message passing and Transferable objects for efficient inter-thread communication. Implement thread orchestration patterns to coordinate tasks across multiple worker threads.
objectives: Architect Worker Thread Pools to offload CPU-bound tasks from the primary Event Loop.
Manage message passing and Transferable objects for efficient inter-thread communication.
Implement thread orchestration patterns to coordinate tasks across multiple worker threads.
